mapper.select:
SELECT B.id personId, B.name, D.name orgName, IFNULL(A.credit, 0) credit FROM xm_person_credit A RIGHT JOIN xm_person B ON A.person_id = B.id LEFT JOIN sys_org D ON B.org_id = D.id WHERE B.is_delete = 0
AND B.name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
AND (B.org_id = #{orgId} OR D.pids like concat('%[', #{orgId}, ']%'))
ORDER BY A.credit DESC
